_comment: Ready-to-use MCP servers for this repo. Copy to `.mcp.json` at the repo root (Claude Code auto-loads it; Cursor/Codex use the same shape). Claude Code expands ${VAR} from your environment — set CONTEXT7_API_KEY in your shell or .env.local. context7 gives your agent up-to-date library docs; filesystem scopes file access to this repo. Vet any additional server before adding it — see docs/agent-skills.md.
